# Trailing comment after all-moved tail travels with last moved decl.
exec sflit -source a.go -sink b.go -receiver App -move
cmp a.go expected_src.go
cmp b.go expected_sink.go

-- a.go --
package p

type App struct{}

func (a App) M() {}

// orphan trailing comment
-- expected_src.go --
package p
-- expected_sink.go --
package p

type App struct{}

func (a App) M() {}

// orphan trailing comment
